R.T: Complete Schedule — All 104 Matches in Indian Standard Time (IST)
11 June – 19 July 2026 | USA, Canada & Mexico | 48 Teams • 104 Matches | IST = ET + 9 h 30 min | † = next day in IST
Both matches in each group kick off simultaneously to keep results fair.
† = Match kicks off the NEXT calendar day in IST | All times converted from US Eastern Time (ET + 9 h 30 min = IST) |
Tunisia vs Japan (21 Jun) = 1,000th match in
FIFA World Cup history | Knockout round matchups TBD once group stage is complete.
